Wooops
I love you so much
What the duck?!
Nope
Ok, we'll reste here for a while
Wow
Nice!

item.dc:creator: MonStar1203

item.title: Wife is an OT and I'm a contractor
item.description:
She asked me to make something that one of her patients could use to practice his finger motor skills.
Went to Home Depot and grabbed some of my leftover lumber and made this simple thing. Now she has three other therapists asking for custom orders!
item.dc:creator: WoodChuckCouldChuck

item.dc:creator: Ultraruben

item.title: Chaotic fun birbs
item.description:
A birb I want to have a beer with
Where is my seed summer?
Cockatoo is fighting for the evil spot
There is a spy in the building
Please.... no.... don't...
Take all my seed for the masterpiece
A dream is a wish your heart makes. I dream of crime
He was for told!
A regular day in San Diego
IAN FREEZE!
I live here now, give seed arsehole
Florida bird strikes again
Don't tell me how to not live
Oh god they can transform and multiply!
I love every second of this tumblr breakdown
Party hard
Covid weight makes that closer to 5oz of blinding chaos
Hit me up to scream in trees
I'll get my poutine hell or goose
Target acquired, commencing attack
Green totally vented...
Snitches don't get seed
My kind of sanctuary
F*ck around and find out
Squakers rights
Both?
Set me free you monster so I can keep pranking you!
Law is weird
Geese are the union busters of the bird kingdom
LOL
brb acquiring a birb
Don't you talk to me or my knife son again
Heaven
Too mighty for even Hercules
* I did it again
You're lucky it's night time you flesh mortal
Unlimited POWER!
Catch these wings you punk fish bitch
Majestic. Nature is healing finally
I'm going to bite you.
llɐ,ʎ ʎpʍoH
Yes please
She's seen your sins
See pervoius quote at 3oz of whoop-ass
yes
I recognize them all as thieving bastards and I'm jealous
One winged devil birb
What is a God to an angry birb
Totally innocent and absolutely did not plan the heist from the beginning
Honk and Peck until it is done
Now I am become Death, the destroyer of worlds
Chicken vs the Man
Poor corn...
item.dc:creator: Mrpink12187

item.title: Its a loveless cashgrab like so many others.
item.description: Lets be real, it will be bad for the same reason wheel of time is bad: No love for the original material, just trying to make it the next Game of Thrones! All they care about is the Lord of the Rings name and nothing beyond that. If the show is at least decent, I would be very suprised. And they will use the "Its because of racism" argument once the show flopps. Because thats the main defense lately...
item.dc:creator: Raoul9753
